title: Te amo sempre, filha
excerpt: Returning to Curitiba, and the host mother whose love outran her politics.

title: Red Tide Summer
excerpt: A summer guiding kayak tours on Anna Maria Island, and the red tide that turned the bay to a graveyard.

title: Hello, again.
excerpt: A campus bar, a new girlfriend's friends, and a memory of the first girl I ever practiced kissing.

title: Nine innings, no notebook
excerpt: An afternoon at the ballpark with nothing to file and everything to notice.

title: Becoming the witch for one night
excerpt: Joining the procession — and what it feels like to be looked at instead of looking.

title: Why I keep returning to the MFA
excerpt: On the museum I treat as a second desk, and the paintings that keep me honest.
